react-aria-components.notes: Initial Vue baseline package exists, but React Aria Components parity is still in progress.

@react-aria/virtualizer.notes: Foundational React Aria virtualizer port to support virtualized Vue collection components, now validated by starter interaction/composable tests and wired into the Vue starter virtualized backlog demo.

@react-aria/actiongroup.notes: Foundational React Aria action-group composables for selection mode and item state in Vue.

@react-aria/aria-modal-polyfill.notes: Foundational React Aria modal-watcher utility for applying aria-hidden around active Vue modals.

@react-aria/autocomplete.notes: Foundational React Aria autocomplete composables for filtering collections and handling search submit/clear behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/breadcrumbs.notes: Foundational React Aria breadcrumb composables for navigation labels and per-item accessibility state in Vue.

@react-aria/button.notes: Foundational React Aria button and toggle-button composables for press state and grouped selection behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/calendar.notes: Foundational React Aria calendar composables for date selection, range selection, and month-grid cell semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/checkbox.notes: Foundational React Aria checkbox and checkbox-group composables for toggle state and grouped multi-selection behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/collections.notes: Foundational React Aria collection node/base classes, cached-children rendering, and builder helpers for Vue data-collection flows.

@react-aria/color.notes: Foundational React Aria color composables for sliders, wheels, areas, swatches, and channel/text field controls in Vue.

@react-aria/combobox.notes: Foundational React Aria combobox composable for filtering, selection, and popup semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/datepicker.notes: Foundational React Aria date picker composables for date fields, time fields, single-date pickers, and range selection in Vue.

@react-aria/dialog.notes: Foundational React Aria dialog composable for labeled dialog props and open/close state in Vue.

@react-aria/dnd.notes: Foundational React Aria drag-and-drop composables for drag lifecycle state, accepted-type filtering, and drop operations in Vue.

@react-aria/example-theme.notes: Foundational React Aria example-theme port for migration starter color tokens and theme metadata helpers in Vue.

@react-aria/focus.notes: Foundational React Aria focus composables for focus-ring visibility and tabbable-child detection behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/form.notes: Foundational React Aria form validation composable for native validation wiring and commit/reset handlers in Vue.

@react-aria/grid.notes: Foundational React Aria grid composables for row/cell semantics, selection helpers, keyboard navigation, and selection announcements in Vue.

@react-aria/gridlist.notes: Foundational React Aria gridlist composables for single-column grid semantics, item-level interactions, sections, and selection checkbox wiring in Vue.

@react-aria/i18n.notes: Foundational React Aria i18n composables for locale state, RTL detection, Intl formatters, and localized string/message formatting in Vue.

@react-aria/interactions.notes: Foundational React Aria interaction composables for focus, hover, press, long-press, move, keyboard, and outside-interaction behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/label.notes: Foundational React Aria label composables for accessible field labeling, aria-labelledby wiring, and description/error associations in Vue.

@react-aria/landmark.notes: Foundational React Aria landmark composables for region role registration and controller-driven landmark focus navigation in Vue.

@react-aria/link.notes: Foundational React Aria link composable for anchor/link roles with focusable and press interaction wiring in Vue.

@react-aria/listbox.notes: Foundational React Aria listbox composables for listbox container semantics, option interactions, section grouping, and option id utilities in Vue.

@react-aria/live-announcer.notes: Foundational React Aria live announcer utilities for assertive/polite screen reader announcements and lifecycle cleanup in Vue.

@react-aria/menu.notes: Foundational React Aria menu composables for menu trigger behavior, menu item selection semantics, section grouping, and submenu state in Vue.

@react-aria/meter.notes: Foundational React Aria meter composable for range clamping, value text formatting, and label linkage semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/numberfield.notes: Foundational React Aria number field composable for spinbutton semantics, stepper controls, input parsing, and clamped range behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/overlays.notes: Foundational React Aria overlays composables for trigger wiring, overlay dismissal, modal/popover semantics, position calculation, and scroll locking in Vue.

@react-aria/progress.notes: Foundational React Aria progress composable for progressbar range clamping, determinate/indeterminate behavior, and value text formatting in Vue.

@react-aria/radio.notes: Foundational React Aria radio composables for radiogroup semantics, arrow-key selection movement, and per-radio selection/press behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/searchfield.notes: Foundational React Aria search field composable for controlled input value, Enter submit behavior, Escape clear behavior, and clear-button semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/select.notes: Foundational React Aria select composables for trigger/menu semantics, selected-key navigation, and hidden form-select wiring in Vue.

@react-aria/selection.notes: Foundational React Aria selection utilities for list keyboard delegation, typeahead focus targeting, and selectable item/collection behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/separator.notes: Foundational React Aria separator composable for role and vertical orientation semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/slider.notes: Foundational React Aria slider composables for grouped slider semantics, track interactions, and thumb range-input behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/spinbutton.notes: Foundational React Aria spinbutton composable for keyboard step actions, press-and-hold stepping behavior, and spinbutton aria semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/ssr.notes: Foundational React Aria SSR utilities for scoped id generation and SSR-environment detection in Vue.

@react-aria/steplist.notes: Foundational React Aria steplist composables for list semantics, selectable step links, and current-step accessibility in Vue.

@react-aria/switch.notes: Foundational React Aria switch composable built on Vue checkbox toggle behavior with switch role semantics.

@react-aria/toggle.notes: Foundational React Aria toggle composable for shared checkbox/switch press and selection semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/toolbar.notes: Foundational React Aria toolbar composable for grouped control semantics and arrow-key focus navigation in Vue.

@react-aria/tooltip.notes: Foundational React Aria tooltip composables for focus/hover trigger behavior and tooltip accessibility linking in Vue.

@react-aria/tree.notes: Foundational React Aria tree composables for treegrid role semantics and expandable tree item controls in Vue.

@react-aria/utils.notes: Foundational React Aria utils baseline for DOM prop filtering, event chaining/merging, id helpers, label helpers, and focusable-node utilities in Vue.

@react-aria/visually-hidden.notes: Foundational React Aria visually-hidden composable for screen-reader-only content and optional focus reveal behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/tabs.notes: Foundational React Aria tabs composables for tablist keyboard navigation, tab selection behavior, and tabpanel labeling semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/tag.notes: Foundational React Aria tag composables for tag-group labeling, selectable grid-row semantics, and keyboard remove behavior in Vue.

@react-aria/test-utils.notes: Foundational React Aria test-utils baseline for pointer maps, long-press helpers, and lightweight ARIA pattern tester classes in Vue test environments.

@react-aria/textfield.notes: Foundational React Aria textfield composables for labeled input/textarea props, validation wiring, and formatted text input guards in Vue.

@react-aria/toast.notes: Foundational React Aria toast composables for notification-region labeling, toast timer pause/resume behavior, and dismissable toast dialog semantics in Vue.

@react-aria/table.notes: Foundational React Aria table wrappers around Vue grid composables for table rows/cells, header interactions, selection checkboxes, and baseline column resize controls.

@react-aria/disclosure.notes: Foundational React Aria disclosure composable for trigger/panel semantics and expanded state in Vue.

@react-spectrum/provider.notes: First-wave target after the initial Vue baseline package, to establish theming and app-level context.

@react-spectrum/button.notes: First-wave primitive aligned with existing VueButton baseline work.

@react-spectrum/accordion.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue accordion and disclosure primitives.

@react-spectrum/actionbar.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue action bar and container primitives for bulk action workflows.

@react-spectrum/actiongroup.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue action group primitives for grouped action buttons and selection.

@react-spectrum/breadcrumbs.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue breadcrumbs for hierarchy and navigation context trails.

@react-spectrum/calendar.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue calendar and range calendar primitives.

@react-spectrum/card.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue card and card view primitives.

@react-spectrum/color.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue color primitives for field, picker, swatch, and channel editing flows.

@react-spectrum/buttongroup.notes: First-wave primitive for grouped button actions and layout alignment.

@react-spectrum/avatar.notes: First-wave visual primitive for identity and user representation.

@react-spectrum/badge.notes: First-wave visual primitive for compact labels and status context.

@react-spectrum/well.notes: First-wave content container primitive for grouped inline context.

@react-spectrum/view.notes: First-wave layout primitive for semantic container structure and spacing.

@react-spectrum/text.notes: First-wave typography primitive for semantic text and emphasis variants.

@react-spectrum/textfield.notes: First-wave primitive aligned with existing VueTextField baseline work.

@react-spectrum/combobox.notes: Composition-layer migration step with an initial Vue combobox primitive.

@react-spectrum/autocomplete.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing a Vue search autocomplete package wrapper.

@react-spectrum/contextualhelp.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing a Vue contextual-help trigger and popover primitive.

@react-spectrum/datepicker.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing Vue date picker, date range picker, date field, and time field primitives.

@react-spectrum/picker.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing a Vue single-select picker primitive and collection item helpers.

@react-spectrum/dialog.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing a Vue dialog primitive.

@react-spectrum/divider.notes: First-wave visual primitive for section separation.

@react-spectrum/dnd.notes: Data-heavy migration baseline for drag-and-drop interactions.

@react-spectrum/dropzone.notes: Data-heavy migration package exposing Vue drop zone primitives for file and text drop interactions.

@react-spectrum/filetrigger.notes: Data-heavy migration package exposing a Vue file trigger primitive for hidden-input file selection workflows.

@react-spectrum/form.notes: First-wave form grouping migration step with a Vue form primitive.

@react-spectrum/icon.notes: First-wave visual primitive for icon, UI icon, and illustration rendering.

@react-spectrum/image.notes: First-wave media primitive for image rendering and object-fit behavior.

@react-spectrum/inlinealert.notes: First-wave messaging primitive for contextual inline notices.

@react-spectrum/illustratedmessage.notes: First-wave content primitive for empty-state and contextual illustrated messaging.

@react-spectrum/listbox.notes: Composition-layer migration step with an initial Vue listbox primitive.

@react-spectrum/list.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing a Vue list view package wrapper.

@react-spectrum/label.notes: First-wave form primitive for semantic labeling and required indicators.

@react-spectrum/labeledvalue.notes: First-wave content primitive for locale-aware read-only label/value presentation.

@react-spectrum/layout.notes: First-wave layout migration package providing baseline Vue Flex and Grid primitives.

@react-spectrum/link.notes: First-wave visual/content migration step with a Vue link primitive.

@react-spectrum/menu.notes: Composition-layer migration step with an initial Vue menu primitive.

@react-spectrum/numberfield.notes: First-wave primitive for numeric text entry.

@react-spectrum/overlays.notes: Composition-layer migration step providing a Vue popover primitive.

@react-spectrum/searchfield.notes: First-wave primitive for search-oriented text input.

@react-spectrum/slider.notes: First-wave primitive for range input controls.

@react-spectrum/progress.notes: First-wave primitive for progress feedback UI.

@react-spectrum/statuslight.notes: First-wave primitive for lightweight status signaling.

@react-spectrum/table.notes: Data-heavy migration baseline for tabular collections.

@react-spectrum/tree.notes: Data-heavy migration baseline for hierarchical collections.

@react-spectrum/s2.notes: Spectrum 2 migration baseline package exposing a Vue aggregate entry point for core provider/form/data-display primitives.

@react-spectrum/tabs.notes: Composition-layer migration baseline for tablist navigation, keyboard interaction, and tabpanel rendering in Vue.

@react-spectrum/tag.notes: Composition-layer migration baseline for tag-group selection and removable tag interactions in Vue.

@react-spectrum/test-utils.notes: Testing utility baseline re-exporting Vue Aria test helpers with mobile/desktop screen-width simulators.

@react-spectrum/theme-dark.notes: Theme token baseline for dark Spectrum variants and scale classes in Vue package ports.

@react-spectrum/theme-default.notes: Theme token baseline for the default Spectrum color-scheme pairing and scale classes in Vue package ports.

@react-spectrum/theme-express.notes: Theme token baseline for Spectrum express variants layered on the default Vue theme package.

@react-spectrum/theme-light.notes: Theme token baseline for lightest Spectrum variants and scale classes in Vue package ports.

@react-spectrum/toast.notes: Toast container baseline with queue helpers and Vue Aria toast-region semantics.

@react-spectrum/tooltip.notes: Tooltip and tooltip-trigger baseline components with Vue Aria trigger semantics and accessibility props.

@react-spectrum/utils.notes: Utility baseline for Spectrum class-name composition, media-query state, and DOM-ref wrappers in Vue package ports.

@react-stately/autocomplete.notes: State baseline for controlled/uncontrolled autocomplete input values and focused node id tracking in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately autocomplete package source lint

@react-stately/calendar.notes: State baseline for single-date and range-date calendar navigation and selection in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately calendar package source lint

@react-stately/checkbox.notes: State baseline for checkbox-group selection with required/invalid tracking in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately checkbox package source lint

@react-stately/combobox.notes: State baseline for combobox filtering, selection, and menu trigger flow in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately combobox package source lint

@react-stately/collections.notes: State baseline for collection builders and traversal helper utilities in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately collections package source lint

@react-stately/color.notes: State baseline for color area/slider/field/channel/picker workflows in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately color package source lint

@react-stately/data.notes: State baseline for mutable list/tree collections and async data loading workflows in Vue.

acceptanceTests.name: Vue stately data package source lint

@react-spectrum/steplist.notes: Data-heavy migration baseline for workflow step navigation and progress indicators.

@react-spectrum/story-utils.notes: Story migration utilities baseline with a Vue error boundary and powerset helper for demo and visual test scenarios.

@react-spectrum/style-macro-s1.notes: Style macro baseline for Spectrum 1 token-style generation with runtime helper parity for Vue migration stories.

tailwindcss-react-aria-components.notes: Tailwind plugin baseline for Vue Aria-style data attribute variants.

react-aria.notes: Meta-package migration depends on a critical mass of @vue-aria package ports.

react-stately.notes: Meta-package migration depends on foundational @vue-stately package ports.
